description: Phase WX-K.6 (2026-05-20) — minimal recipe for the `chain` chip per HARNESS_PATHWAY_TAXONOMY.md. Fires when the user describes a multi-step task that composes other chips (e.g., 'PDF → MP3', 'research topic → write article → generate cover image → post to Slack'). Total context <10KB. The dispatcher runs a cheap LLM call against the goal + the chain-composer template (mchatai-source/wizard/prompts/chain-composer.md) to propose a JSON array of steps. Each step has {chip, subtype, goal, inputFrom?} and recursively delegates to its leaf chip's pathway (chain steps cannot themselves be chain — the executor rejects). After execution, the user is offered Save-as-Workflow promotion (BlueprintPromotionService activation path, deferred to K.6.b).
